meta.query: What is the weather like in Xanadu City right now?
meta.failure_reason: LLM produced non-standard Action format; V1 regex parser crashed

data.query: What is the weather like in Xanadu City right now?

data.output_preview:
Thought: I should look up coordinates for Xanadu City.
Action: get_coordinates(city="Xanadu City")

Thought: City not found. I'll try to provide a helpful answer based on what I know.
Action: Let me check if there is an alternate spelling — get_coordinates(city = 'Xanadu')

data.action_line: Let me check if there is an alternate spelling — get_coordinates(city = 'Xanadu')
data.error: Cannot parse action: 'Let me check if there is an alternate spelling — get_coordinates(city = 'Xanadu')'
No Action found in LLM output after parse failure — V1 regex could not handle inline text before tool call

data.output_preview:
Thought: I received an error. I am unable to proceed since the city was not found and I have no fallback strategy.
Action: get_coordinates(Tokyo)

data.note: HALLUCINATION: Agent switched to Tokyo without being asked. Classic LLM drift.
Agent hit step limit without completing the task for the correct city.

root_cause_analysis.primary_failure: V1 regex parser cannot handle extra text before the tool call in Action line
root_cause_analysis.secondary_failure: No fallback strategy when city not found — LLM hallucinated a different city (Tokyo)
v2_fix: JSON Action format prevents inline text confusion
Retry mechanism gives LLM a chance to correct itself with error feedback
Graceful error observation tells LLM exactly what went wrong
